Event:
Event Date:
Sage Bot Item Code: E20
Engraving 'Massive Impact'

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, deals 23500 / 33600 / 48000 / 64000 / 80000 / 100000 / 130000 physical damage to all enemy fighters in a small area around it.

Enhancement: 2
50000 Health from the gems
Once in a while, deals 35300 / 50400 / 72000 / 96000 / 120000 / 150000 / 195000 physical damage to all enemy fighters in a small area around it and reduces their fortitude and accuracy by 10% / 11% / 12% / 14% / 16% / 20% / 25% for 5 sec.

Enhancement: 3
100000 Health from the gems
Once in a while, deals 47000 / 67200 / 96000 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 / 260000 physical damage to all enemy fighters in a small area around it and reduces their fortitude and accuracy by 21% / 23% / 24% / 26% / 28% / 30% / 33% for 5 sec. The fighter also tear through the target's armor. When the enemy's armor is torn, that enemy takes 28200 / 40300 / 57600 / 76800 / 96000 / 120000 / 156000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 21% / 23% / 24% / 26% / 28% / 30% / 33% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. The enemy also takes 47000 / 67200 / 96000 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 / 260000 physical damage for 5 sec.
